spawn/prefer_spawn and assign_next internal assign_task calls preserve their current idempotency behavior.

src/tool/communicate.rs forwards explicit operation_id to direct and spawn/prefer_spawn assign_task requests.
src/server/comm_control.rs uses a nonce-based mutation key only when request_nonce is present and keeps the default payload-derived key otherwise.

notes: Assign_task explicit operation_id now provides stable retry idempotency across payload drift while preserving default payload-keyed behavior for calls without operation_id.
